channel.title: All Teams - Release Notes
channel.description: Combined release notes from all teams

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.9.0
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Amazon Signage Stick (ASS) dedicated player. Previously ran Amazon Fire OS player on ASS device.

View release notes →

item.description:
1Password

All Mac iOS

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.7.16
item.description:
ScreenCloud

Rollback release fixing issues introduced in v4.7.12. Released at 50% for Fire OS players alongside v4.6.30.

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.11.2
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Support for Amazon’s Remote Device Management (RDM) for Signage Sticks, including:Screen/TV mute and unmute via HDMI-CECScreen/TV power on and off via HDMI-CECDevice rebootScreenshot and full-screen captureDeep cache clearing (player app and Android system cache)Player app restartCPU and GPU...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Updates Weekly Recap - March 13, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Updates to meetings made by a delegate user are now sent in the name of the principalIn Google Calendar this can be set up by sharing an executive’s calendar with “Make changes to events” or “Make changes and manage sharing” permissions with a delegate user. | Learn more about how updates to...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build for Canary Channel 29550.1000
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, today we’re releasing Windows Insider Preview Build 29550.1000 to the Windows 11 Insider Canary Channel on the optional 29500 build series. What’s new in Canary Build 29550.1000 Change The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build for Canary Channel 29550.1000...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Gemini in Chrome expands to more countries and languages, including Canada, New Zealand, and India
item.description:
Google Workspace

Gemini in Chrome is rolling out now to Canada, New Zealand, and India, and we’re adding support for 50+ more languages across these countries and in the United States. You can see the full list of supported languages here.Gemini in Chrome empowers business and education users with AI tools that...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28020.1737 (Canary Channel)
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, today we are releasing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28020.1737 to the Canary Channel. (KB 5079452) What’s new in Canary Build 28020.1737 Changes and Improvements g The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28020.1737 (Canary Channel) appeared first on Windows...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26300.8068 (Dev Channel)
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, today we are releasing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26300.8068 (KB 5079464) to the Dev Channel. Changes in Dev Channel builds and updates are documented in two buckets: new features, and improvements (inc The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26300.8068...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26220.8062 (Beta Channel)
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, today we are releasing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26220.8062 (KB 5079458) to the Beta Channel. Changes in Beta Channel builds and updates are documented in two buckets: new features, and improvements (i The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26220.8062...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Whisk is moving to Flow on April 30, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

On April 30, 2026, the best capabilities from Whisk are moving directly into Flow, Google's unified platform for AI-powered image and video creation.Users with active Whisk accounts will receive an email announcing this change. An in-product notification will guide them through migrating their...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Use Help me schedule in Gmail to easily set up a meeting time with multiple guests
item.description:
Google Workspace

Finding time to meet often requires numerous back-and-forth emails, particularly when coordinating between multiple internal and external stakeholders. To address this, we are expanding the "Help me schedule" functionality in Gmail (introduced in October 2025) to support group meetings.Previously,...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Releasing Windows 11 Builds 26100.8106 and 26200.8106 to the Release Preview Channel
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, today we’re releasing Windows 11 Builds 26100.8106 and 26200.8106 (KB5079387) to Insiders in the Release Preview Channel on Windows 11, versions 24H2 (Build 26100) and 25H2 (Build 26200). This update is available through tw The post Releasing Windows 11 Builds 26100.8106 and...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Added new User API fields
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | New request fields added to User API.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 2.3.15-1
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: action-required, bug-fix, sdk-version | Addresses a WebRTC issue that caused session negotiation failures and fallback to WASM on Chrome 147 and later. If you rely on WebRTC video, we strongly advise that you upgrade to ensure compatibility with upcoming Chrome versions.

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Optional scopes have landed
item.description:
Slack

You can now mark individual OAuth scopes as optional when configuring your Slack app! Optional scopes give users more control over what data your app can access during installation, without blocking them from installing your app entirely.

View release notes →

item.title: Claude - Claude creates interactive charts, diagrams and visualizations
item.description:
Claude
View release notes →

item.title: Claude - Custom visuals in chat
item.description:
Claude
View release notes →

item.title: Scribe - You can now ask any Agent in Optimize to generate a process map from your workflow data. Agents create a BPMN-style map directly in the...
item.description:
Scribe
View release notes →

item.title: Scribe - Generate process maps from any workflow
item.description:
Scribe
View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Control continuous meeting chat for your organization
item.description:
Google Workspace

Last year, we launched the ability to continue your Meet conversations in Chat. That rollout will continue this month, with the release to Scheduled Release domains planned to start the week of March 23. In the meantime, we’re excited to introduce a new admin control for this feature In the...

View release notes →

item.title: Claude - Work across Excel and PowerPoint
item.description:
Claude
View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - interactive visual module
item.description:
ChatGPT

“Help me understand the Pythagorean theorem.”“Explain how PV = nRT works.”“How do I find the area of a circle?” Availability: Rolling out to all logged-in ChatGPT users across consumer and business plans.

View release notes →

item.title: macOS - macOS 26.3.2 (25D2140)
item.description:
macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Better screen scaling for Google Calendar on large monitors
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Calendar on the web now offers improved scaling on large, high-resolution monitors. This update provides a clearer overview of your day or week by reducing unnecessary whitespace and better utilizing your available screen space.Previously, users with large or high-resolution monitors may...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Assign Google Calendars to Google Meet hardware in bulk
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re making it easier to manage calendar assignments for your Meet hardware devices. You can now assign or unassign Google Calendars to your Meet hardware devices in bulk by uploading a CSV file. For organizations with a large number of devices, this eliminates the need to assign calendars one by...

View release notes →

item.title: macOS - macOS 26.4 beta 4 (25E5233c)
item.description:
macOS

View downloadsView release notes

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - New Device ID for Google Meet hardware
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re replacing the current Device ID (“Legacy ID”) for Google Meet hardware devices with a new Device ID. This new Device ID will be displayed everywhere you currently see the Legacy ID throughout the Google Admin console:The device list, details, history, and videocalling pages (Admin console >...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Updates to meetings made by a delegate user are now sent in the name of the principal
item.description:
Google Workspace

In many organizations, executives and senior leaders rely on admins or delegates to oversee their busy schedules. In Google Calendar this can be set up by sharing an executive’s calendar with “Make changes to events” or “Make changes and manage sharing” permissions with a delegate user.We’re...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 2.13.4
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: sdk-version | Optimize CSS message transmission performance.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 3.1.0
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: bug-fix, sdk-version | Adds customizable style configurations for agent connection states, multi-agent control in remote assist sessions, keyboard-based annotation support for accessibility, and masking for image, SVG, and iframe elements. Optimizes display clarity for large images and...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Updates to Zoom Rooms API
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new response fields to Zoom Rooms API.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New zoomEnhancedMedia Field Added to User APIs
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | New zoomEnhancedMedia field for the User APIs. You can now include this field in requests when creating or updating users (POST and PUT). It also appears in responses for user creation, updates, retrievals, and patches.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New fields in the Channel API
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added `access_type` request and response field.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Updates Weekly Recap - March 6, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Improved join permission logging for Google Meet Audit eventsGoogle Meet Audit event logging for endpoints will now also include the permission type used to grant access to join a meeting. | Learn more about improved join permission logging for Google Meet Audit events.Workspace admins can allow...

View release notes →

[UPDATE 3/11/26]: We are rolling out standalone Update Build 26300.7966 (KB5082257). This update does not include anything new and is designed to test our servicing pipeline for builds in the The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26300.7965 (Dev Channel) appeared first on Windows...

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Why: We're committed to bringing Google's latest AI innovations faster to Google AI Ultra users, including our most powerful reasoning capabilities to
item.description:
Gemini

Why: We're committed to bringing Google's latest AI innovations faster to Google AI Ultra users, including our most powerful reasoning capabilities to help you tackle even more complex problems.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: We’re releasing a major upgrade to Gemini 3 Deep Think, our specialized reasoning mode, built to push the frontier of intelligence and solve mod
item.description:
Gemini

What: We’re releasing a major upgrade to Gemini 3 Deep Think, our specialized reasoning mode, built to push the frontier of intelligence and solve modern challenges across science, research, and engineering. By blending deep scientific knowledge with everyday engineering utility, Deep Think now...

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Why: We want to make Gemini the most helpful AI assistant for everyone. With the advanced reasoning of Gemini 3.1 Pro, you can now tackle your most co
item.description:
Gemini

Why: We want to make Gemini the most helpful AI assistant for everyone. With the advanced reasoning of Gemini 3.1 Pro, you can now tackle your most complex projects with greater confidence.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: Building on the Gemini 3 series, we’re releasing 3.1 Pro, a smarter and more capable model for complex problem-solving. 3.1 Pro is designed for
item.description:
Gemini

What: Building on the Gemini 3 series, we’re releasing 3.1 Pro, a smarter and more capable model for complex problem-solving. 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn’t enough, taking advanced reasoning and making it useful for your hardest challenges. This improved intelligence can...

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Try Gemini
item.description:
Gemini
View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - GPT-5 Instant
item.description:
ChatGPT

The model is trained to more accurately detect and respond to potential signs of mental and emotional distress. These updates were guided by mental health experts, and help ChatGPT de-escalate conversations and point people to real-world crisis resources when appropriate, while still using language...

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - Plus, Pro, Business and Enterprise/Edu
item.description:
ChatGPT

Installing the app requires the connector to be enabled for your account. Visit the ChatGPT app for Slack page to get started with installation.

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - Free, Go, Plus, Edu, and Pro
item.description:
ChatGPT
View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - ChatGPT Images
item.description:
ChatGPT

All images you create with ChatGPT are automatically saved under My images at https://chatgpt.com/images, giving you a single place to browse, revisit, and reuse your work without having to sift through past conversations. Learn more about ChatGPT Images in our ChatGPT Images FAQ.

View release notes →

item.description:
Canva

item.title: Canva - The Get design export formats API is no longer in preview, and is now generally available.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Get design pages API now returns page dimensions for pages in bounded designs (unbounded designs like whiteboards and Canva Docs will not have pag
item.description:
Canva

The Get design pages API now returns page dimensions for pages in bounded designs (unbounded designs like whiteboards and Canva Docs will not have page dimensions).

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The List folder items API now supports a pin_status parameter to filter for pinned items in a folder.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.description:
1Password
View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - New dynamic data source support for dropdowns in Google Chat apps
item.description:
Google Workspace

Developers can now build more robust and efficient Google Chat apps using dynamic data sources for dropdown menus. With this update, developers can connect dropdowns to external data sources that query and filter results in real-time as a user types, addressing previous scalability issues caused by...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - New supported markdown types for rich text in Block Kit
item.description:
Slack

The following new supported markdown types for rich text when using Block Kit in your apps are being rolled out:

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - This update to GPT-5 Instant is starting to roll out to ChatGPT users today.
item.description:
ChatGPT
View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Set status method scope update
item.description:
Slack

The assistant.threads.setStatus API method now accepts either the assistantwrite scope. This allows channel-based apps to use AI loading states in channels, without having to request assistantwrite scope in favor of the chat:write scope exclusively, so update your app soon!

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Release: Slack CLI v3.14.0
item.description:
Slack

Version 3.14.0 of the developer tools for the Slack platform has landed!

View release notes →

macOS

item.title: Claude - March 2026
item.description:
Claude

Memory for free users Memory from chat history is now available for all Claude users, including free users. For more information, refer to the following articles: Use Claude’s chat search and memory to build on previous context

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Expanded Fax log management APIs and webhook events
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new Fax APIs to update and delete fax logs and introduced related webhook events. Enhanced Fax log APIs with a new `read_status` response field.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Added new webhook event
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new surveys webhook event that denotes a completed survey.

item.title: ClickUp - Release Notes 4.02
item.description:
ClickUp

Update Task Types in Views, Pin AI Notetaker, and more! This week’s release unlocks the ability to manage Task Types in Views, add date ranges to Gantt view exports, and so much more. Update Task Type Column in Your Views: Quickly see and update task types directly from your List and Table views....

View release notes →

Claude
View release notes →

item.description:

item.title: Slack - Announcing the Slack MCP server and Real-time Search API
item.description:
Slack

We're excited to announce the release of not one, but two, major components designed to significantly enhance how Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI agents interact with your workspace data: the Slack Model Context Protocol (MCP) server and the Real-time Search (RTS) API!

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Anywhere Weekly Recap - 02.13.2026
item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - Enhanced Proof of Play (POP) with **Hourly Reporting**, giving all customers more granular visibility into content performance throughout the day. - Improved Proof of Play to ensure reporting data...

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Booking V9.7.1
item.description:
Korbyt

# What’s New? ## Deep Link to Locate Colleague on Floorplan (Bookit) Implemented a deep link capability in Bookit that enables authenticated users to directly locate a colleague’s booked space on the floorplan via a URL and book near them. ### Key Functionality **Hyperlink Integration** • The...

View release notes →
